name: Feature request

## Why this matters

Describe the operational gap this feature would close.

## Proposed behavior

What should `shum` do differently?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] measurable criterion one
- [ ] measurable criterion two

## Scope

Prefer explicit boundaries; avoid broad "all operations" asks.
